content.en:
There are too many star crystals, especially some large star crystals, if Ye Tian wants to take them out, it will take a long time, and even need to be measured in years.

Fortunately, Ye Tian and the others are all Heavenly Monarchs, and time is nothing to them.

Many Heavenly Monarchs waited in time, but they didn't leave, and they have been waiting silently in the Ten Star Sea.

In the blink of an eye, 3,000 years have passed.

After such a long time, Ye Tian and the others finally brought out all the Xingchen Crystals, and the greatest credit among them was undoubtedly Ye Tian.

Because Ye Tian had cultivated the Starlight Immortal Hand to the consummation realm, he could easily take out a fist-sized Star Crystal in the later stage, and it didn't take much time at all.

It is precisely because of Ye Tian's help that so many star crystals can all come out in three thousand years, otherwise it would take at least tens of thousands of years.

Looking at so many star crystals, Ye Tian estimated the value.

"At least worth 300 billion points!"

Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

300 billion points, what an unimaginable wealth!

Before, so much wealth belonged to the Demon Sound Sect, presumably the Demon Sound Sect at that time was in ecstasy, but now I am afraid that my heart hurts to death!

This is also to blame for the lack of perseverance of the Demon Sound Sect at the beginning, if they did not hesitate to cultivate a group of Heavenly Monarchs who knew the stars and chaos supernatural powers, and took out the star crystals as quickly as possible, then there would not be much loss.

It's a pity that they think that the news will not leak out, although they are also cultivating celestial monarchs who can know the star type chaos supernatural powers, but these celestial monarchs are either at the entry level of chaotic supernatural powers, or the power of chaotic supernatural powers is too low, and there is no way to take out the star crystals.

At this time.

The Heavenly Monarchs of the Void Heaven Temple were also estimating how many Star Crystals they could obtain.

According to the previous agreement, the Void Heaven Temple could get six percent of the share, which was worth at least 16 billion points.

For the Void Heaven Temple, what does 16 billion represent, and what kind of wealth is that?

"I'm the third Heavenly Monarch on the Heavenly Monarch List, and I have a very high status in the Void Heaven Palace, so I can at least get a few hundred million points, right?"

Hundreds of millions of points!

He has a lot of points, but he has never had so many points.

Moreover, this time he didn't spend anything at all, he didn't even experience a battle, just came here and waited for a while, and he could get so many points.

Thinking of this, he glanced at Ye Tian, and his heart was grateful.

All this is the credit of Ye Tian!

Before, he still had some bitterness about Ye Tian, but now everything is gone, only gratitude and respect remain.

Subsequently.

The major forces began to distribute star crystals, and none of them dared to break the rules, otherwise they would withstand the attacks of other forces, which is not something that any force can withstand.

Not long after, the major forces all obtained their own share of the Star Crystal, and the major forces were extremely happy, only the Demon Yin Sect had a wry smile and helplessness, and even resentment.

"Go back!"

Ye Tian shouted.

The Heavenly Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall have returned to the Void Heaven Palace, and then it is time for the Heavenly Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall to distribute the Star Crystals.

This time, Ye Tian had the greatest credit, and he should naturally have obtained the most Xingchen Crystals, which others would never dare to refute, and no one dared to disagree.

Even the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch, as well as several half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouses, didn't have any objections.

3 billion points of star crystal!

This is the share that Ye Tian has obtained, and several other half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouses, as well as Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch, Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch and others, have basically obtained more than 100 million points.

That is to say, all the Heavenly Monarchs can get more than 100 million points, while some weak Heavenly Monarchs can only get a few million points or tens of millions of points at most.

Even if there were only so many, they couldn't be more excited.

In addition, Ye Tian and the others also took out a billion points as a reward for the god generals, as long as these god generals made a breakthrough or made a great contribution, they could get these points.

------------

"3 billion points, plus those star crystals I obtained before, are worth at least 100 million, and this time I have obtained a total of at least more than 3.1 billion points!"

Ye Tian was very excited in his heart.

He had also thought about occupying all of those Star Crystals before, but it was not realistic at all, the longer the time dragged on, the greater the change.

Moreover, the Demon Yin Sect is all located inside the Ten Star Sea, and he is estimated that he will not even be able to invade next time.

If the Demon Sound Sect is given enough time, they will do whatever it takes to cultivate a celestial monarch who can use the stars and chaos powers, and they will definitely be able to take away the star crystal, and he may not even be able to get a piece of the star crystal at that time.

Now this situation is also very good, losing most of the Star Crystals and gaining a small number of Star Crystals, so many resources are enough for him to cultivate for a long time.

It can even be said that the resources of the Heavenly Monarch Realm have basically been accumulated.

"Next, it's to exchange Xingchen Crystal for resources and start cultivating wildly!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the days that followed, the universe was very chaotic, and the Dark God would begin to assassinate some Heavenly Monarchs continuously.

The cause is naturally Xingchen Crystal!

The Dark God Society did not participate in the affairs of the Ten Star Seas, so they did not obtain the Star Crystal, but how high the value of the Star Crystal was, they naturally wanted it.

So, they attacked those Heavenly Monarchs and robbed them of their Star Crystals.

In addition, some casual cultivators also secretly attacked, such as zero.

Zero killed some Heavenly Monarchs and obtained a lot of Star Crystals, which caused the wrath of the major forces, and many half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouses besieged Zero, but they still couldn't help Zero.

But later, the major forces signed an agreement with Zero, so that Zero was not allowed to attack, otherwise he would be killed at all costs.

......

A forbidden place in the universe, on a majestic snow-capped mountain.

Zero, who made everyone tremble in the Heavenly Monarchs of the outside world, was here, and he couldn't help but show joy with some star crystals in his hands.

"Xingchen Crystal, good luck, the last time I lost the Eternal Flame, my physical body could not reach the extreme, but Xingchen Crystal can be a substitute, once the physical body reaches the extreme, I can condense the Supreme True Spirit, and then my strength will inevitably skyrocket!"

Zero muttered.

Suddenly, his eyes flashed with murderous intent: "Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, the last time you seized my Eternal Flame, when I step into the half-step True Spirit Realm, I will definitely kill you!"

Before, he thought that the person who seized his Eternal Flame was the Heavenly Monarch of the Dark God Society, and he also killed several Heavenly Monarchs of the Dark God Society, but not long ago, the Demon Sound Sect sold Ye Tian's information.

Ye Tian will never extinguish the fire and move the Great Realm, what does this mean, it means that Ye Tian has refined the Eternal Flame, and he will move the Great Realm, which is completely consistent with the mysterious Heavenly Monarch that day.

Although this time, the leakage of the Demon Sound Sect's Xingchen Crystal was Ye Tian's credit, but his Xingchen Crystal was snatched by himself, and it was not given to him by Ye Tian, so he would not be grateful to Ye Tian.

"Retreat, after exiting, kill ten thousand dharma daozi!"

Zero cold channel.

......

Ye Tian didn't know about Zero's situation, but even if he knew, he wouldn't be afraid.

It's just a zero, and it's not enough to make him panic.

At this time.

Ye Tian has obtained a large number of resources, in the case of points, what resources can't be bought?

His cultivation was almost smooth all the way!

The peak of the ninth layer of the Xuanxu Jue began, and he progressed step by step, advancing towards a higher level.

The ninth layer is small!

The ninth floor is complete!

After Ye Tian had spent hundreds of thousands of years, Ye Tian had finally cultivated the ninth layer of the Xuanxu Jue to the consummation realm.

At this point, the Mandate of Heaven Chapter of Xuanxuan Jue has also been completely completed.

There is also a True Spirit Chapter in the Xuan Xuan Jue, but if you don't condense the True Spirit, then there is no way to start cultivating.

Therefore, in terms of physical body, Ye Tian has almost reached the extreme, but he has not yet reached the real extreme, he can still use some treasures to continue to refine until he can no longer refine it.

Of course, no matter how much he refined, he could only improve a little, after all, he was already infinitely close to the limit.

In addition, Ye Tian's soul and chaotic divine power were also very close to the limit level under the drive of the Xuan Xuan Jue, but they could still improve a lot.

"Next, let's comprehend the Chaos Divine Power, focusing on the four Chaos Divine Powers of Eternal Immortal Extinguishing, Time and Space Shifting, Great Realm Shifting, and Blood River Immortal Technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His supernatural comprehension talent has been upgraded to the super-god level, and his own comprehension is very rebellious, far surpassing that barbarian ancestor.

Therefore, in terms of understanding, no one can match him.

Under such a terrifying comprehension, Ye Tian easily comprehended the Blood River Immortal Technique to the extreme level, which was also his first extreme chaotic divine power, and it only took him hundreds of thousands of years.

Next, Ye Tian cultivated the Eternal Immortal Fire to the extreme level, and it took more than 800,000 years.

With the cultivation of the Chaos Divine Power to the extreme realm, Ye Tian's strength had already completely surpassed the other Heavenly Monarchs, and even surpassed Zero, becoming the number one on the new Heavenly Monarch List.

But soon after, Zero's ranking disappeared from the Heavenly Monarch List.

Everyone knows that Zero has become a half-step true spirit!
